summary: CRITICAL: actions/checkout@v4 violates pinning requirement—must be commit SHA with date comment. Module code follows PowerShell conventions (Set-StrictMode, error handling, single-responsibility functions) but workflow design has gaps: missing test fixture files in fixtures/, incomplete input validation for fixture paths, and no verification through act. Workflow references ./Bumper.Tests.ps1 which is not provided. Code is lean (no bloat) and modular but cannot be validated as production-ready without action pinning fix and act execution proof.
